```python
def fact(n):
    result = 1;  # Fixed the initial value of result from 0 to 1
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        result *= i;  # Removed the semicolon after result *= i
    return result
```

def flatten(lst):
    return [item for sublist in lst for item in sublist]
